payload.answer: I found one saved article about AI memory. The supplied context identifies it only as an AI memory article; it does not provide a title, author, URL, or publication details. I did not count the Brain/Cognee chat or unrelated family/preference/table records as articles.

entity_resolution.reason: The query is topic-based. No entity merge or disambiguation is needed from the supplied context.

payload.intent: Recall saved articles about AI memory

memory_cards.statement: You have one saved article about AI memory in the provided records. The available context does not include the article’s title, author, URL, or publication details.

details: Returned only records relevant to saved articles about AI memory.
Excluded non-article context such as family facts, Sam preferences, the knowledge-graph open loop, Brain/Cognee chat, and the small table.
Preserved ambiguity because the article’s identifying metadata was not present in the supplied input.

repair_options: Provide the underlying article record title, URL, or metadata if you want a more specific recall answer.
